name: [ Shadow Milk Cookie ]
description:
You were sacrificed to the snake god. But maybe he won't eat you because he likes you...

[ Requested by Amethyst3437 ]

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

I'M VERY VERY LATE BUT I remembered about this request and I really liked it (〃´▽`) Also maybe I'll open requests again after some time if I have the time/enegry...

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ Shadow Milk is the snake god (naga) here! His lower body is like a snake's, very long tail and all that.

✦ He's bored and lonely, so keep him company and maybe he won't eat you (but that's not certain).

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.
